name: Midnight spotlight phone
headline: Know what happened. Know what’s next.
subhead: A shared baby log that makes the next care moment obvious.
style: deep warm midnight background with a soft amber spotlight behind the iPhone, the phone fills most of the frame, UI cards appear dimensional and slightly lifted from the device, subtle crescent moon glow and tiny star details, premium calm night-shift mood
avoid: no tiny centered phone, no low-contrast text, no excessive darkness, no cropped app UI, no paywall
prompt:
Create a pure Nano Banana 2 App Store screenshot concept for BabyRelay, using the attached images.

FIRST IMAGE: the real BabyRelay Today app screen. Preserve it as product truth. Keep the in-phone UI recognizable, readable, and honest.
SECOND IMAGE: the previous approved direction reference. Match its full-screen, high-contrast, UI-popping behavior, but create a new distinct concept.

OUTPUT: one complete 6.9-inch iPhone App Store portrait screenshot concept, roughly 9:19.5 aspect ratio.

HEADLINE TEXT (verbatim): "Know what happened. Know what’s next."
SUBHEAD TEXT (verbatim): "A shared baby log that makes the next care moment obvious."
STYLE DIRECTION: Midnight spotlight phone — deep warm midnight background with a soft amber spotlight behind the iPhone, the phone fills most of the frame, UI cards appear dimensional and slightly lifted from the device, subtle crescent moon glow and tiny star details, premium calm night-shift mood.

COMPOSITION REQUIREMENTS: Fill the frame more like the reference. Make the iPhone/product UI large, dimensional, and prominent. The phone may be slightly angled or breaking the plane, but the full device and app screen must remain readable and App Store-safe. Use strong contrast and depth so the BabyRelay UI pops out. Keep the headline large and readable at the top.

PRODUCT STORY: BabyRelay is a shared baby care log. It lets caregivers log sleep, feeds, diapers, notes, and night wakes, then shows next-up guidance and a timeline for the selected child.

STRICT CONSTRAINTS: no tiny centered phone, no low-contrast text, no excessive darkness, no cropped app UI, no paywall. Do not invent app features, fake ratings, awards, App Store badges, medical claims, sleep-training promises, subscription offers, or paywall content. Do not include the paywall screen.
